name: Upper East Side Classic duplex
description: Sleek visual refresh of a luxury living room and custom cabinetry. We applied premium eggshell matte paint on double-height walls, combined with flawless semi-gloss hand-painted details on window trims and integrated crown moldings.

photos.caption: Pristine living room styling, hand-rolled with low-VOC interior gray.
Detailed finish around baseboards and custom woodwork.

name: Brooklyn Heights Brownstone
description: A comprehensive historic brownstone exterior façade restoration. This involved surface scraping, cracks repaired with breathable masonry filler, and three distinct layers of premium weatherproof elastomeric protective paint.

photos.caption: Before: Exterior façade weathered and stained.
After: Restored to state-of-the-art visual glory using rich modern gray.

name: Chelsea Kitchen Cabinet Lacquering
description: Transforming solid oak wood storage units. The work utilized airless fine-finish spraying of premium polyurethane polyurethane lacquer in Stonington Slate Gray, changing the room dramatically without the cost of a full rebuild.

photos.caption: Before: Dull and outdated golden oak finish.
After: Striking modern cabinets sprayed to furniture-grade perfection.

name: Soho Creative Loft Workspace
description: Sleek commercial space highlighting bold accent walls, industrial concrete columns, and beautiful white open ceilings. Focused on creating a vibrant collaborative space for a modern design studio.

photos.caption: Symmetrical administrative spaces featuring matte charcoal support walls.
Conference room painting detailing matte borders.
